name: GIANT CELL REPARATIVE GRANULOMA
definition: GIANT CELL REACTION = GIANT CELL GRANULOMA

demographics.Histo: numerous giant cells in exuberant fibrous matrix arranged in clusters around foci of
demographics.Peak age: 2nd + 3rd decade (range, childhood to 76 years); 74% < 30 years of age; M÷F = 1÷1

dominant_finding: expansile bone remodeling with multilocular appearance
distribution: periosteal reaction is unusual (as in GCT)
discriminating_features: expansile bone remodeling with multilocular appearance
expansile lytic defect of 2-2.5 cm in diameter with internal trabeculations
matrix mineralization may be seen (DDx to GCT)

Gnathic (1-7% of all benign oral tumors): expansile bone remodeling with multilocular appearance
Small bones of hand + feet (less common): expansile lytic defect of 2-2.5 cm in diameter with internal trabeculations
matrix mineralization may be seen (DDx to GCT)
periosteal reaction is unusual (as in GCT)
